title: tragacantha follicularis
intro: Tragacantha follicularis, also known as Tragacanth or Persian or Gummy Ghatti, is a type of plant that belongs to the milk thistle family and is commonly found in the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant's roots and sap have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tragacantha follicularis include its ability to promote bowel regularity, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as a powder or liquid extract, and can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or added to food products, such as baked goods and smoothies.
